'''CorSec Wing''' was a hyperspace route stemming from [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. It was fiercely controlled by both [[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Any [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] ships found navigating the route would be shot down on sight by the Alliance.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' {{1st}}
